dry_run_payload.texture_prompt: Retexture this existing M4A3 75mm Sherman tank as Alpha: realistic olive drab WWII field paint, deep crimson field-painted recognition stripe on glacis and turret, hand-painted white letter A, old overpainted tactical marks, hatch boot wear, localized fuel and oil stains, lower-hull mud, disciplined veteran crew maintenance, no fantasy markings, no decals floating off the surface, preserve the existing geometry and silhouette.

provenance.decision: Do not fake Alpha with runtime planes. Use Meshy Web retexture or extend CLI/API path for actual model texturing.
provenance.message: Input task mode "api-image-to-3d" is not supported for this endpoint. Supported modes: api-text-to-image, api-image-to-image
